comments.author: @Emargonaut
comments.text: Congratulations to Bodø/Glimt & hats off to the  supporters that traveled all the way from the Arctic Circle to carry their team to the playoffs. As an Atlético de Madrid fan, I have to acknowledge how well Bodø/Glimt played, exploiting our team's deficiencies and getting an unexpected win. Despite how dissapointed I am, I am also happy that you in particular were the ones responsible for the upset. I've been following Bodø since last year's UEL semifinals, and yesterday you showed once again great courage and believed in your players, and you did what almost no club can do: defeat Atlético at its bastion 👏👏👏. I'm rooting for you guys. Best of luck for the next stages of the UCL 🍀.

Starting gyokeres, having that man brutally torment physically and emotionally both center backs for 60+ minutes, while he gets next to no service btw, is why when Jesus and havertz have come on after long injuries and look so fresh that they are steps ahead of the defenders.

Just by being in the starting lineup gyokeres does something to defenders no one else can do. They gotta be ready for a physical battle. That sets in and then silky havertz and magician Jesus come on with an extra yard off them when they receive the ball cuz the defenders legs are gone

Gyokeres unlocks the whole thing and extends the field. Give rice more space because defense has to sit back more, gives wingers more space because they have to stay tighter centrally.

Gyokeres starting is the gift that will keep on giving
